title: Geospatial information for Disaster Risk Reduction Information
content: The session will highlight practical approaches to strengthening national geospatial information management capacities.

title: Disaster Risk Financing and Innovation
content: Crucial for securing resources, this training examines modern financing tools (e.g., insurance, contingency funds, catastrophe bonds) and innovative proposal writing to close the fiscal gap in disaster recovery and resilience investment.

title: “Risks” and “communication”: conceptual discussion from the perspective of complex transdisciplinarity
content: This article explores the concept of risk communication, highlighting the lack of a unified definition and proposing a transdisciplinary, complex-thinking approach to better understand it.
snippet: This article explores the concept of risk communication, highlighting the lack of a unified definition and proposing a transdisciplinary, complex-thinking approach to better understand it.

title: Here are 6 ways that climate change is affecting sports around the world
content: The sports economy is worth $2.3 trillion a year, but faces challenges from our changing climate. A new World Economic Forum report outlines pathways to ensure resilience.
snippet: The sports economy is worth $2.3 trillion a year, but faces challenges from our changing climate. A new World Economic Forum report outlines pathways to ensure resilience.

title: Understanding how plants pause and restart growth can help develop climate‑resilient crops
content: When plants face biting cold, floods or parched soil, they can’t run away or seek shelter like animals. Instead, they have to develop ways to overcome and survive them until the weather improves.
snippet: When plants face biting cold, floods or parched soil, they can’t run away or seek shelter like animals. Instead, they have to develop ways to overcome and survive them until the weather improves.

snippet: Transforming climate science into meaningful health protection requires sustained collaboration and capacity building across sectors, and services that are robust and long-lasting.

title: Disaster Risk Reduction Summer School

title: Shifting wind patterns are posing greater climate risks for smallholders in West Africa

title: Migration and climate pressures deepen flood risks in Bangladesh’s haors

title: Climate disinformation as a rising challenge for news media in France, Spain, Poland and Brazil
